observed_problem: ReferenceError: cartHasItems is not defined on every page; drawer coupon box and recommendations never render; error re-fires every 1.8s
suspected_root_cause: Commit 23f7c95 (C3) removed cartHasItems() definition but kept 6 call sites; setInterval remount loop repeats the throw
user_impact: Cannot apply coupon in mini cart; drawer looks bare/plugin-like; console errors in critical flows
acceptance_criteria: No console errors on home/PLP/PDP/cart/checkout; coupon box and recommendations visible with items in cart; coupon apply/remove works in drawer

observed_problem: Product rows collide: row height fixed at 78px while content is 139-158px; text/price/qty bleed into next card
suspected_root_cause: phase6-commerce.css:395 min-height:78px+align-items:center!important and :389 max-height:31dvh fight C3 premium layout (:643); plus master-upgrade.css:242 and cosmoskin-final-uat-fix.css:154 layers
user_impact: Cart looks broken/cramped with 2+ items; core purchase surface feels untrustworthy
acceptance_criteria: With 1/2/3/5 items and long names + stock warnings, no overlapping boxes at 360/390/430/768/1280; rows grow with content

observed_problem: Serif title wraps with orphan word (Seçtiğin ürünleri kontrol / et); head block copy-heavy; kicker+title+subtitle+trust+edit link
suspected_root_cause: Fixed copy string; no responsive type scale for drawer head
user_impact: Drawer head feels weak/unbalanced on mobile
acceptance_criteria: Drawer head max 2 text levels; no orphan wrap at 320-430px; stronger modern heading per design target

observed_problem: Single recommendation card with prev/next arrows feels like a widget/plugin
suspected_root_cause: pickRecommendations limit 1 + arrow carousel
user_impact: Sub-premium impression
acceptance_criteria: Recommendation area redesigned (e.g. one refined row without arrows) or removed

observed_problem: document.write script fallback and permanent setInterval(mountCartExtras,1800); full innerHTML rerender on qty change
suspected_root_cause: Legacy bootstrapping patterns
user_impact: Perf overhead; scroll jump risk in drawer; fragile loading
acceptance_criteria: Event-driven mount (no polling); no document.write; qty change preserves item scroll position

observed_problem: order-tracking.html and account/index.html ship drawer without phase6 premium enhancement (legacy 38px Sepet head)
suspected_root_cause: Pages missing phase6-commerce.js include
user_impact: Inconsistent drawer between pages
acceptance_criteria: All pages with #cartDrawer load the same drawer stack

observed_problem: Cookie banner overlaps drawer CTA / cart summary / checkout stock card / favorites empty CTA; consumes most of 390px viewport
suspected_root_cause: #cookieBanner z-index above .drawer(320) and modal layers; no compact mobile variant
user_impact: Blocks primary commerce CTAs until dismissed; poor first-visit mobile UX
acceptance_criteria: Banner never covers open drawer/summary CTAs; compact single-row mobile variant; z-index below drawers or docks above bottom-nav

observed_problem: Saving name/phone/birthday silently resets marketing/newsletter/stock/routine opt-ins and metadata in profiles
suspected_root_cause: PATCH handler builds full-row upsert with normalizeBool(undefined)=false; frontend sends partial payload
user_impact: Consent/CRM data corruption (KVKK-relevant); switches appear to not persist
acceptance_criteria: PATCH merges only provided fields (or frontend sends full state); saving profile never changes opt-ins; regression validator added

observed_problem: Birth date may appear editable but not persist if profiles.birthday/lock columns are missing in production; UI cannot clear a birthday
suspected_root_cause: Column provenance unverified; frontend omits empty birthday from payload
user_impact: User-reported broken field
acceptance_criteria: SQL verification confirms columns; save+refresh persists; locked-change UX communicates the one-time rule

observed_problem: Preference toggles are plain checkboxes, not premium animated switches
suspected_root_cause: No switch component in account CSS
user_impact: Feels unfinished vs Sephora/Rhode target
acceptance_criteria: Accessible animated switch component (prefers-reduced-motion safe) used across notifications/cookie prefs

observed_problem: Rotated HESAP BILGISI stamp renders skewed/broken; huge blank band between error card and footer
suspected_root_cause: Decorative rotated overline + page min-height without content
user_impact: Error state looks broken
acceptance_criteria: Error/gate state fills layout intentionally; stamp removed or properly designed

observed_problem: Card generations mix radii/shadows; stat text relies on overflow-wrap:anywhere band-aids
suspected_root_cause: UX1 patch layered over older card CSS
user_impact: Slightly dated/dense feel
acceptance_criteria: Single card token set (radius/shadow/spacing); no anywhere-wrap needed at 360-1280

observed_problem: Add to cart always rejected with stock error on products/isntree-hyaluronic-acid-watery-sun-gel.html
suspected_root_cause: Page missing inventory-client.js so COSMOSKIN_STOCK undefined and cartStockCheck returns ok:false
user_impact: Product cannot be purchased from its PDP
acceptance_criteria: Page loads inventory-client.js; add-to-cart works; page-drift check added to validator

observed_problem: Client treats unknown stock as blocking for add-to-cart/qty when inventory API missing or failed (contradicts I2 invariant client-side)
suspected_root_cause: cartStockCheck returns ok:false when window.COSMOSKIN_STOCK absent
user_impact: False add-to-cart blocks on script failure
acceptance_criteria: Unknown stock allows add with checkout-side validation; warning copy instead of hard block

observed_problem: Removed favorites can resurrect after login/cross-device
suspected_root_cause: user_metadata.favorites not rewritten on removal; hydrate merges local+remote with metadata fallback
user_impact: Users see deleted favorites return
acceptance_criteria: Remove updates all three stores (or metadata store retired); hydrate reconciles deletions; cross-device remove test passes

observed_problem: Every favorite toggle POSTs entire list item-by-item plus auth.updateUser
suspected_root_cause: saveFavoritesToAccount loops all favorites
user_impact: Slow/racy sync; request spam
acceptance_criteria: Single delta request per toggle (or bulk endpoint); no metadata write per toggle

observed_problem: Heart glyph sits slightly off-centre in its 44px circle (crooked perception); 3 duplicate .favorite-btn CSS blocks with different sizes/z-index
suspected_root_cause: Asymmetric SVG path in 24px viewBox; CSS drift across phases (style.css:2251/2340/2383)
user_impact: Sub-premium cards
acceptance_criteria: Single .favorite-btn block; optically centered heart verified at PLP/PDP/search/bestsellers/recs

observed_problem: Guests can favorite (local-only) while ensureFavoriteAuth login-guard exists unused
suspected_root_cause: Intent divergence between phases
user_impact: Favorites lost when guest clears storage; inconsistent expectations
acceptance_criteria: Decide: guest favorites kept with login-merge (current) or login-gated; dead code removed

observed_problem: Tier system code-complete but customer_membership_status/RPC/cron live state unverified
suspected_root_cause: Migrations exist; apply-state and cron scheduling unconfirmed
user_impact: Tier could show Essential for everyone if RPC missing
acceptance_criteria: SQL verification passes; a paid order moves spend/tier; cron schedule confirmed in Cloudflare

observed_problem: No dedicated admin surface for customer tier review
suspected_root_cause: Not built
user_impact: Support cannot answer tier questions quickly
acceptance_criteria: Admin customers view shows tier + lifetime spend + qualifying orders

observed_problem: Brevo contact upsert only fires in iyzico-callback; bank-transfer customers never sync; /api/brevo-sync has no caller
suspected_root_cause: Sync call not wired into create-checkout/commerce-finalization
user_impact: Most customers absent from CRM lists/segments
acceptance_criteria: All completed orders (both payment paths) upsert Brevo contact with segments; sync failures logged

observed_problem: No abandoned-cart event, storage or email anywhere
suspected_root_cause: Never built
user_impact: Lost recovery revenue
acceptance_criteria: Cart snapshot + abandoned_cart event model designed; email flow via Brevo automation

observed_problem: No unsubscribe token/endpoint; Brevo unsubscribes not synced back; double opt-in absent (confirmed_at set immediately)
suspected_root_cause: Not built
user_impact: KVKK/ETK exposure; stale subscriber lists
acceptance_criteria: One-click unsubscribe link in emails; status synced to newsletter_subscribers+consent_records; opt-in policy decided and implemented

observed_problem: Segment tags first_order/vip/interested_brand/abandoned_cart not produced; birthday not synced to Brevo attributes
suspected_root_cause: deriveCommerceSegments scope
user_impact: Weaker campaign targeting
acceptance_criteria: Segment map extended; birthday attribute synced with consent

observed_problem: Unstyled artifact top-left: raw COSMOSKIN text + floating 4 badge above announcement bar (local repro; verify prod)
suspected_root_cause: Mobile-redesign header fragments render before CSS gate on checkout-premium-page
user_impact: Broken-looking checkout header
acceptance_criteria: No unstyled fragments at any width on checkout; verified on production

observed_problem: price_changed message shown with success (green) styling in one path
suspected_root_cause: checkout-flow.js:899 setStatus(...,'success')
user_impact: Price increase can read as good news
acceptance_criteria: Repriced state uses neutral/warning tone in both paths

observed_problem: Stock pill rendered twice per recommendation card (under title and in CTA slot)
suspected_root_cause: stockBadge + CTA replacement both render state
user_impact: Unpolished look
acceptance_criteria: One stock indicator per card; CTA hidden or disabled cleanly

observed_problem: Corporate/invoice details re-entered each order; not saved as reusable billing profile
suspected_root_cause: No billing-profile store
user_impact: Friction for repeat corporate buyers
acceptance_criteria: Billing details savable and selectable like delivery addresses

observed_problem: user_favorites/notifications/shipments/reviews/review_images/review_helpful/support_requests DDL live outside supabase/migrations (commerce-schema.sql, schema.sql, reviews.sql, FINAL_LAUNCH fix)
suspected_root_cause: Early-phase schema files never folded into migrations
user_impact: Unknown production drift; risky future migrations
acceptance_criteria: Read-only verification run; missing objects added via new idempotent migrations; schema files reconciled

observed_problem: profiles.birthday/birthday_change_count/birthday_last_changed_at/birth_date_locked and 4 opt-in columns unverified in production
suspected_root_cause: Same provenance issue
user_impact: Birth date field may silently no-op
acceptance_criteria: information_schema check passes; else additive migration prepared

observed_problem: crm_events/newsletter_subscribers/consent_records/notification_preferences apply-state unverified; crm_sync_logs & email_unsubscribe_tokens missing by design
suspected_root_cause: Phase3 migration exists but unconfirmed
user_impact: CRM writes may be failing silently (all inserts are .catch(()=>null))
acceptance_criteria: Verification queries confirm tables+RLS; silent catch paths get error logging

observed_problem: No browser-level smoke tests; C3 regression (cartHasItems) shipped despite validator suite because validators are static-only
suspected_root_cause: Validator scripts grep code, never execute pages
user_impact: Runtime regressions reach production
acceptance_criteria: Playwright smoke suite: home/PLP/PDP/cart/drawer/checkout/account render with zero console errors; cart drawer coupon flow exercised headlessly in CI
